name: bouncer
description: A one-file PreToolUse door-guard that bounces destructive Bash commands (rm -rf, DROP TABLE, curl|sh, force-push, device wipes) before they run. Blocks 45/45 known footguns, 0 false positives.

interface.shortDescription: Bounces destructive shell commands before they run
interface.longDescription: A one-file PreToolUse guard that denies destructive Bash commands (rm -rf, DROP TABLE, curl|sh, force-push, device wipes) before Codex runs them. 45/45 known footguns blocked, 0 false positives.
